message:
test: add isomorphism algorithms fuzz target

fuzz_isomorphism drives is_isomorphic / is_isomorphic_directed (VF2)
plus the necessary-condition filters (could_be_isomorphic,
faster_could_be_isomorphic, fast_could_be_isomorphic) on
structurally-arbitrary graph pairs, asserts a graph is isomorphic to
itself, and asserts the implication
``is_isomorphic ==> could_be_isomorphic`` so a regression in either VF2
or the cheap invariant checks shows up as a fuzzer crash.

Smoke-tested with 2000 runs (1397 cov features, no crashes) and seeded
with seven small inputs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -135,3 +135,8 @@ doc = false
 name = "fuzz_cycles"
 path = "fuzz_targets/fuzz_cycles.rs"
 doc = false
+
+[[bin]]
+name = "fuzz_isomorphism"
+path = "fuzz_targets/fuzz_isomorphism.rs"
+doc = false
